query: Count all buildings in Narvik municipality that intersect snow-avalanche hazard areas.

1.description: Retrieve the kommunenummer for Narvik municipality

2.description: Select all building points (representasjonspunkt) that belong to the retrieved kommunenummer

4.description: Find building points that intersect the avalanche hazard polygons

5.description: Count the distinct buildings that intersect the hazard areas
